item.title: It's the unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
i am totally showing this meme to my dad
makes sense
looks suspect
i'm a fan of this for some reason
democracy is beautiful
clever
nice
mood
lemme get some of that 2017 discipline though
i can relate to this because i'm a hardened criminal
good stuff
wonder if that's photoshop or an actual goat/moth hybrid
mmm hmm
obviously
we've all done this but survived
it's a special day
as is tradition
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.description: All of a sudden, I saw Sheriff John Brown"

item.title: In an age of corporate overgrowth, greed and control, always remember true heroes like these exist

item.title: Can't make it clearer than that.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Captain Free Speech is at it again…
item.dc:creator: deaconshadow

item.title: The Void Dumps Back - Episode 8
item.description:
Hope everyone is having a great Caturday!
Stardew Valley farmer has entered th chat...
Free the mouse!
I like slightly cool water. Definitely not cold. Ice is a huge no-go.
Used to drink the little things of cream when I was a kid.
Is it good, though?
It me.
NOOOOOOOOOOOOOO
I have been listening to a lot of podcasts, and oh man, this drives me nuts.
*hugs* Edit - wow guys, never made most viral before. Thanks! If I get to ask for something, um... Just be excellent to each other, please. *individual hugs to everyone that wants one*
item.dc:creator: DaBaDoop

item.title: Backlogged memes again
item.description: Imgur is being a jerk about posting with commentary for some reason so have some memes with no commentary at all, idk I have like a three month backlog I’ve been working on my book. This is as good a place as any to drop the link https://tr.ee/XTefRiN_sF
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: Smol potato living his best life
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Pop Psych Terms vs. REAL Psychology Definitions
item.dc:creator: swisspassport

item.title: SecretHarpy's Meme Library: Volume 22
item.description:
Hello and welcome to yet another meme dump, my imgur friends. It is spring and the trees hate me and my sinuses for daring to exist, but nonetheless I have braved the clouds of pollen to bring you quality funny shit. Oh, and because I know someone is gonna be like, "HEY SECRETHARPY, I'M GONNA NEED SOME VERIFICATION FOR THAT TOP IMAGE" here you go. Have fun reading about this hilarious disaster: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Athletics_at_the_1904_Summer_Olympics_%E2%80%93_Men's_marathon
I told you I braved the pollen, didn't I? Only the best for my good ol' friends on imgur
Or they don't understand the reference. Sad times.
I am too annoying it most certainly is a trap
o m e l e t t e d u f r o m a g e
I sure do too, buddy
hell yeah ladies
anyone wanna start a cult?
¯\_(ツ)_/¯
And as a super pale person, it's either wear layers to block the sun and be human soup, or shed them and be roasted alive by the sun. Fun times.
Do not cite the deep magic to me, I was there when it was written
very fragile pls leave me alone
how terribly accurate!
That's all for this installment folks, I shall see you in the next meme dump. Til' then, stay awesome imgur
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: You know you broke when you depend on someone else to get you WATER

item.title: Backlogged memes (kirbaguette)
item.description: What the fork is wrong with Imgur. Why is it not letting me upload posts with commentary. I have to go back and add it in like some sort of PEASANT. I won’t do it. I have my pride. Get your shirt together, Imgur. Anyway have some memes. And if you want context too bad, Imgur said no.
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: Mike Ilitch is a Detroit Legend
item.description: Not only was he the Founder of Little Caesar's, but also owner of BOTH the Detroit Tigers and Red Wings. That man had glorious hair. He passed away in 2017.
item.dc:creator: LogicDude

item.title: Sundowners (OC)
item.description: I like that in the second panel, the dude REMOVES his sunglasses to stare at the eclipse... It just makes me chuckle... If you like my comic strip, there's more on my instagram https://www.instagram.com/gryzlock_comics Have a great day Edit: Thanks for the FP friends :)
item.dc:creator: gryzlock
